articles.description: Elden Ring is one of the best FromSoftware releases of all time, and it's back in a big way for an entirely new platform.
articles.content: FromSoftware games really do seem to have their own little place in gaming folklore, with the developer spawning an entire genre and garnering a huge and dedicated fan base across all the world's maj… [+2145 chars]
